name: Pea Jelly (Chinese Version of Yokan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak split peas overnight in 6 cups water.
2. Drain the split peas.
3. Pressure cook over low heat using 5 cups water for 1 hour or until very soft.
4. (Optional) You may also cook on top of the stove as you would for soup.
5. Strain the peas into a saucepan.
6. Soak gelatin in 1/2 cup water.
7. Mix peas, sugar, gelatin, and food coloring together.
8. Let set in the fridge at least 4 hours or until completely set.
9. Cut into squares and serve.
From: Michael Loo
